prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: DLX-GARDENTOOL-6PCSET Product Type: GARDEN_TOOL_SET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 6pc Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Tool Set with Mini Trowel Shovel Hoe & Claw Description: This 6pc Wooden and Steel Handheld Garden Tool Set covers all the essentials for your gardening needs.

Featuring:
14" Shovel Tool
12" 2 in 1 Mini Hoe Cultivator & Mini Rake
13.5" Three-Prong Garden Fork Cultivator
12" Triple Claw Cultivator
11" Mini Draw Hoe
13.5" Garden Spade Trowel

These handheld garden tools work great to assist you in your garden with:

-Digging soil for new plants, flowers or succulents
-Aerating soil to allow essential nutrients to reach plants roots for optimal growth
-Transplanting flowers, herbs or succulents to a different area in your garden or if planting a new flower pot, plant pot or succulent planter
-Moving or transferring small amounts of soil, compost materials or fertilizer
-Cutting into hardened soil, clay or tough roots
-Loosening, lifting and turning soil for both planting and transplanting
-Breaking up clay, sod, soil clods or hardened ground
-Removing unwanted garden debris
-Weeding large sections of soil
-Leveling and grading soil before planting
-Constructing narrow furrows or shallow trenches for planting seeds, bulbs, flowers, plants, succulents and more
-Digging but more predominantly, scooping
-Slicing or cutting through and lifting soil
-Edging or reshaping lawns or plant beds
-Skimming surface soil weeds

Featuring wooden handles, a steel tool heads, and a comfortable soft foam grip wrap, this garden tool set is easy to handle, durable, and will last you through many gardening seasons to come. For longevity sake, rinse and dry the tools when you are done gardening, planting or weeding, and store in a dry place. Search Terms: gardening gloves tools gifts kit shears trowels mini hand knee pad succulent plant care indoor stand garden shovel rake Features: - ROUND POINT GARDEN SHOVEL: This wooden handheld round point garden shovel is perfect when you have to dig holes, for removing large sections of weeds or for planting or transplanting small plants, flowers, succulents or herbs throughout your garden or to a planter, plant pot or flower pot - GARDEN MATERIAL MOVEMENT: The 14" wooden handheld garden shovel is pointed with a rounded tip, making it a useful tool not only for digging but to move or transfer smaller amounts of soil and for cutting into hardened soil, clay or even tough roots - COMFORTABLE HANDLING: The comfortable and ergonomic wooden handle is surrounded by a soft foam wrap grip to give your hand and inner palm protection when gardening, weeding or planting - QUALITY MATERIALS: Featuring wooden handles and a steel shovel head, this garden shovel is durable and will last you through many gardening seasons to come; for longevity, rinse and dry the garden shovel tool when you are done and store in a dry place - SPECIFICATIONS: Country of Origin: China; Materials: wood handle, soft foam grip wrap, steel tool head; Dimensions: 14" Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 6-pc Wooden Steel Handheld Garden Tool Set
